title: Edviro: AI agents vs school energy waste
imageStyle: dark night scene with warm amber and acid-green energy glow, flowing power-line light trails, gold chrome accents, high contrast

scenes.text: Your school spends more on *energy than textbooks*
scenes.voiceSegment: Your school probably spends more on energy than on textbooks and computers combined.

scenes.label: of school energy is wasted
scenes.voiceSegment: U S districts burn nearly eight billion dollars a year on energy, and about thirty percent of it is just wasted.

scenes.imagePrompt: aerial view of a school campus at night, several buildings with glowing windows, luminous energy streams rising from each rooftop into a watching constellation of small sensor points above
scenes.text: Edviro: AI agents watching every building 24/7
scenes.voiceSegment: A Y C startup called Edviro puts AI agents on that problem. They connect the meters and controls, and watch every building around the clock.

scenes.imagePrompt: x-ray cutaway view of a school building interior showing ducts pipes and HVAC systems as glowing schematic lines, one single section flaring bright hot as an anomaly among the calm systems
scenes.text: Catch the waste · simulate the fix · prove it on the bill
scenes.voiceSegment: When something starts wasting power, the agent catches it, simulates the fix, and then proves the savings on the actual bill.
Less waste, more textbook money. Follow for daily AI news.
